description: Composition Light blue and black plaid check shirt made of 100% cotton, that has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a button at the elbow level so that the sleeves can be rolled up with buttoned with a flap, spread collar with tape detailing on the inseam, front buttoned placket, embroidered brand name on the left chest and curved hem Fitting Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Update your casual style with this check shirt from belmonte. The bold plaid checks and embroidered brand name gives an simple, sophisticated look, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans or khakhis and leather slip-on shoes for a laidback vibe. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
